caption: A presentation slide titled "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" and "Tutorial – 2" is displayed, featuring a section on "Liquid yield" and a mathematical formula for "y". The slide includes a temperature-entropy (T-s) diagram with a blue cycle and labeled points from 1 to 4, indicating processes such as "T=const", "p=const", "D=const", and "h=const". The NPTEL logo is visible in the lower-left corner, and the bottom banner attributes the content to "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay". As the presentation progresses, a data table appears beneath the formula, listing values for pressure "p (bar)", temperature "T (K)", enthalpy "h (j/G)", and entropy "s (j/G K)" for points 1, 2, and 3. The visual remains static across the sequence, with the only change being the appearance of this table in the latter half of the clip.
